pageContext.name: The Amazing Spider-Man #800 (Variant Edition)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Grey Matter Art are proud to present The Amazing Spider-Man #800 (Variant Edition) Fine Art Print!  This variant cover art for the astounding 800th issue of The Amazing Spider-Man sees our hero appearing almost specter-like in a beautifully dark vision from legendary artist Moebius (Jean Giraud).  Limited to 125 pieces, this print is hand-numbered and printed by Grey Matter Printing.  Marvel fans, be sure to add this spectacular Spider-Man artwork to your collection today!
